summary: NT Commerce 12.0 - Iteration 78 Code Quality Testing. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified: login page loads, admin login redirects to SaaS admin dashboard, tenant login redirects to tenant dashboard, sidebar shows 7 reorganized sections as expected.

minor.issue: Returns 403 for super admin (expected - tenant-specific endpoint)
Returns 500 for tenant - may need investigation but not blocking

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ auth.py duplicate deleted - unified-login works correctly for both admin and tenant
✅ 220 lines of models extracted to models/extra_schemas.py - imports working correctly
✅ _id projections fixed in ai_assistant_routes.py - no _id leaks in products/customers responses
✅ ErrorBoundary added to App.js - wraps AppRoutes component
✅ apiClient.js created - centralized API client with interceptors
✅ Sidebar reorganized from 17 sections to 7 collapsible sections for tenant users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 78 tested code quality improvements. All refactoring verified: auth.py deleted, models extracted, routes cleaned, ErrorBoundary added, apiClient created, sidebar reorganized to 7 sections. 18/18 backend tests passed. Frontend login and dashboard working correctly.

auth_endpoints.auth_me_admin: PASS - GET /api/auth/me returns admin user info
auth_endpoints.auth_me_tenant: PASS - GET /api/auth/me returns tenant user info

admin_only_endpoints.cache_stats: PASS - GET /api/cache/stats returns cache info (admin only)
admin_only_endpoints.robots_status: PASS - GET /api/robots/status returns robot status (admin only)

no_id_leaks.products_no_id: PASS - Products response has no _id field
no_id_leaks.customers_no_id: PASS - Customers response has no _id field

frontend.login_page_loads: PASS - Login page loads without errors
frontend.sidebar_7_sections: PASS - Sidebar shows 7 reorganized sections: الرئيسية, المبيعات والمشتريات, المخزون, الزبائن والمالية, الذكاء الاصطناعي والتقارير, الخدمات, الإعدادات والإدارة
